results.title: Rupee rises 5 paise against US dollar in early trade
results.description: The rupee appreciated 5 paise to 96.11 against the US dollar in early trade on Wednesday, supported by a weaker dollar and positive domestic equities. However, higher crude oil prices, foreign fund outflows and tensions in West Asia limited the currency's gains

results.title: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez Offers Forceful Advice For TV Stations About Trump's Thursday Speech
results.description: The progressive congresswoman was asked for her take on the somewhat mysterious address Trump has announced -- and she delivered.

results.title: Cardinal to file legal action against MP Chamara Sampath
results.description: Archbishop of Colombo Cardinal Malcolm Ranjith is to file legal action against MP Chamara Sampath Dassanayake for making false statements, Cardinal’s spokesman Fr. Cyril Gamini Fernando said today.

results.title: County Council needs to shelve its latest no-vote-of-the-people tax-increase maneuver: editorial
results.description: As our editorial board has previously noted, one constructive alternative would be to increase the city’s admissions tax but limit the increase only to the two Gateway facilities – Progressive Field and Rocket Arena.

results.title: Water bills waived for over 300 flood-hit households in Melaka
results.description: MELAKA: More than 300 flood-hit households in the state will not have to pay their water bills this month following a RM50,000 special relief initiative by the state government.

results.description: Puri: The Shree Jagannath Temple Administration has announced the detailed ritual schedule for the much-anticipated Rath Yatra of Lord Jagannath, Lord Balabhadra, and Devi Subhadra, set to take place in Odisha's Pilgrim City of Puri on Thursday (July 16). results.title: Bhai Tera Star Hai | Song - Nach Le Lalariya
results.description: Watch the song 'Nach Le Lalariya' from Hindi movie 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' starring Raghav Juyal, Sanjay Kapoor, Niharika NM and Barkha Singh. 'Nach Le Lalariya' is sung by Jasmine Sandlas and Sudhir Yaduvanshi and music of the song is given by Amit Trivedi. Lyrics of 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' song 'Nach Le Lalariya' are written by Kumaar. 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' also stars Vikalp Mehta, Vivan Bhathena and Chandan Roy Sanyal in pivotal roles. To know more about 'Nach Le Lalariya' song from Raghav Juyal and Sanjay Kapoor starrer 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' watch the video.

results.title: Ghana risks losing U-20 AFCON hosting rights without stadium upgrades — Kofi Adams
results.description: The Minister of Sports and Recreation, Kofi Adams, has warned that Ghana could lose the opportunity to host next year’s U-20 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) if urgent improvements are not made to the country’s sporting facilities.
